meta.title: The Loop
meta.description:
3-minutes from Marty Edwards on "The Loop" in process control from the OnRamp Online. It is the best short description I've heard, and ICS security pro's should know what it is they are trying to protect.

The next OnRamp Online starts on July 8th, see https://lnkd.in/gt8TqHj and get up to speed fast on #icscybersecurity.  #training
